creator: brian@collab.net
text:
Libgda compiles/installs with NO_CHECKSUM=yes and without the patch
patch-providers::gda-default-server::Makefile.in; the other patches
applied cleanly.

Gnome-db just appears to be a checksum mismatch, the patches apply
cleanly.

On a related note, in /etc/defaults/make.conf, MASTER_SITE_GNOME should be
ftp://ftp.gnome.org/pub/GNOME/%SUBDIR%/ instead of
ftp://ftp.gnome.org/pub/GNOME/sources/%SUBDIR%/, it seems.

	Brian
